kept.text:
$COIN 

After the red day yesterday, because of Robinhood's earnings, today seems like a good day to load up.

The financials are doing well, they're innovating, and the technicals look primed to go higher.

Earnings are coming up (on May 7th), and this could be the catalyst.

It's priced in they'll have bad earnings (after $HOOD), but let's see what they can do.

This resistance line has been getting tested repeatedly and it seems like we'll break out of it.

I think they beat earnings and we send higher.

kept.text:
$COIN

The price has seen a very deep pullback, which can still be interpreted as a wave 4 within a diagonal, although the structure is becoming less typical. A wave 4 in a diagonal is allowed to retrace toward the 61.8% level, which in this case is around $181.36, and even slightly beyond. The formal invalidation level remains the wave 2 low at $162.70. Given the depth of the pullback, the structure is less clean, but it has not been decisively invalidated. The current focus is on whether the market can form another high. Due to the deep retracement, a full extension toward $250 appears less likely. A more reasonable upside target for a potential wave 5 would be around $229.70.
#Coinbase
